prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FOLDINGSLUICEBOXBACKPACK-KHAKI-D-2PC Product Type: BACKPACK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box for Gold Prospecting Backpack Set, Desert Khaki Description: The backpack and sluice box gold panning kit combo set from ASR Outdoor was designed to give you the edge while panning for gold with portability in mind; inside the backpack, we've included our 50 inch aluminum folding sluice box. This lightweight, sluice box for gold panning incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50 inch run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a 5 gallon bucket as well as the included 30L canvas backpack making this ideal for beginner gold panning, day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding gold sluice box into remote areas anywhere!

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining operations with this sluice box backpack gold panning kit.

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar models in that they will often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The sluice box features a uni-body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long rust-free service, fitted over grey miners moss and gold carpet which is pre-installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own when starting out. Ideal for use in conjunction with ASR Outdoor classifier screens.

With our top load canvas backpack you'll be able to carry as much equipment as you need. This 30L hiking day pack has room, even while filled with the sluice box to contain all your outdoor gear; featuring quick release buckles and a draw string closure to keep your things secure while at the same time making them readily accessible in the large central pouch. The two side pouches close securely by zipper and canvas flap. Search Terms: complete adult gold panning kit classifier screen set prospecting equipment mining tools folding sluice box kids gold pan hiking adventure mineral collection paydirt gifts for dad Features: - GOLD PANNING KIT INCLUDES: ASR Outdoor 50 inch portable aluminum folding gold sluice that fits into our 30L gold prospecting backpack (2 total pieces) - EFFORTLESS USE: Gold mining equipment ready to deploy from your backpack. No assembly required. When extended in stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning - HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Best in quality components included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. For all experience levels of gold panning enthusiasts - GOLD SLUICE BOX: Highly durable, constructed from rust-free aluminum. Includes miners moss and gold carpet pre installed. Extended Dimensions: 50" Length; 9.25" Channel; 2.5" Side Wall; Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9.25" x 7" (LxWxH); 13.25" Flange - CANVAS BACKPACK: Lots of space in central pouch, secured by drawstring and buckle snaps. Side pouches secured by zipper and canvas flap. Total Volume: 30L (1830 cubic inches); Compartments: (2) side pouches (1) front pouch (1) top load === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50in Aluminum Folding Sluice Box Desert Khaki
